title: Loan Calculator
description: Free and easy-to-use loan calculator tool. Calculate monthly payments, total interest, and amortization schedule for your loan.

importantNotes.title: Important Notes
importantNotes.note1: Interest rates may vary depending on bank policies
importantNotes.note2: Displayed rates are nominal, actual rates may differ
importantNotes.note3: Payments include principal and interest only, excluding other fees
importantNotes.note4: Different loan types may have different rates and conditions
importantNotes.note5: Always review terms and conditions carefully before borrowing

principal.title: Principal Amount
principal.description: The amount of money you borrow from a bank or financial institution

interest.title: Interest Rate
interest.description: The percentage you pay on top of the borrowed amount

term.title: Loan Term
term.description: The duration of time you have to repay the loan

payment.title: Monthly Payment
payment.description: The amount you pay each month including principal and interest

point1.title: Principal and Interest
point1.description: Each payment includes both principal and interest components

point2.title: Decreasing Interest
point2.description: Interest decreases over time as you pay down the principal

point3.title: Payment Schedule
point3.description: Detailed table showing principal and interest portions of each payment

before.title: Before Borrowing
before.tip2: Compare interest rates from multiple lenders
before.tip3: Read all terms and conditions carefully

during.title: During the Loan
during.tip1: Make payments on time to avoid penalties

after.title: After Payoff
after.tip3: Maintain loan records for future reference

homeLoan.name: Home Loan
homeLoan.description: Low interest rate, long term, real estate collateral

carLoan.name: Car Loan
carLoan.description: Average interest rate, 5-8 year term, vehicle collateral

personalLoan.name: Personal Loan
personalLoan.description: Higher interest rate, no collateral required, fast processing

businessLoan.name: Business Loan
businessLoan.description: Rate depends on business plan, guarantee required
